name: PoliMATHS
description: Eight-channel CV and audio event generator for the N.U.S.S. Generates complex Rise-Fall functions with variable-shape oscillations at eight independent outputs using Spread and Modulation Dissemination.

controls.name: Span
controls.description: Sets Channel Span for Activation per current Span Mode. In Channel Index mode, also Activates channel upon selection if Activate is unpatched.
controls.detail: Modes: White=Ch.Index · Yellow=Round · Blue=Parallel · Magenta=Binary Counter

controls.name: Span CV Input attenuverter
controls.description: Bipolar attenuator for Span CV Input. Set CW in Channel Index mode to translate Channel Index messages from other N.U.S.S. modules.

controls.name: Mode Button
controls.description: Selects Span Mode shown by Span Activity Window. Long press switches Oscillation Bias (Unipolar/Bipolar).

controls.name: Cycle Button
controls.description: Enables cycling. Hold to switch cycle mode. Hold Cycle + Mode to toggle SubMixing.
controls.detail: Off=no cycle · Purple=Cycle ALL · Pink=Follow the Leader

controls.name: Spread Combo Pot
controls.description: Bipolar control for Spread parameter. Sets direction and amount of modulation sent to unpatched Spreadable parameters across 8 channels.
controls.detail: Bipolar · When Spread CV patched: operates as attenuverter

controls.name: Curve Panel Control
controls.description: Sets the Curve of the Activated functions, from logarithmic to linear to exponential.
controls.detail: CCW=log · noon=linear · CW=expo · Unity CV in

controls.name: Rise Panel Control
controls.description: Sets the Rise time of Activated functions. Spreadable parameter.
controls.detail: Short to long · Gold legend = Spreadable

controls.name: Rise Attenuverter
controls.description: Bipolar attenuator for Rise CV Input via Modulation Dissemination, or Spread amount if Rise CV is unpatched.

controls.name: Fall Panel Control
controls.description: Sets the Fall time of Activated functions. Spreadable parameter.
controls.detail: Short to long · Gold legend = Spreadable

controls.name: Fall Attenuverter
controls.description: Bipolar attenuator for Fall CV Input via Modulation Dissemination, or Spread amount if Fall CV is unpatched.

controls.name: Shape Panel Control
controls.description: Sets the Shape of oscillations from falling saw to triangle to rising ramp. Unity CV in for live control.
controls.detail: CCW=falling saw · noon=triangle · CW=rising ramp · CV extends to noise

controls.name: Strength Panel Control
controls.description: Bipolar control for output amplitude and polarity. CCW=negative, noon=zero, CW=positive. Spreadable.

controls.name: Strength Attenuverter
controls.description: Bipolar attenuator for Strength CV via Modulation Dissemination, or Spread amount if Strength CV unpatched.

controls.name: Rate Panel Control
controls.description: Sets the Rate (frequency) of oscillations superimposed on the Activated function. Spreadable parameter.
controls.detail: Slow to fast · Gold legend = Spreadable · Tracks 1V/oct when attenuverter full CW

controls.name: Rate Attenuverter
controls.description: Bipolar attenuator for Rate CV via Modulation Dissemination, or Spread amount if Rate CV unpatched.

controls.name: Osc Panel Control
controls.description: Sets oscillation depth mixed into Activated Functions. CCW=no oscillation (pure envelope). Spreadable.
controls.detail: CCW=off · CW=full oscillation · Gold legend = Spreadable

controls.name: Osc Attenuverter
controls.description: Bipolar attenuator for Osc CV via Modulation Dissemination, or Spread amount if Osc CV unpatched.

inputs.name: Activate
inputs.description: Gate input. Rising edge Activates channels per Span and Mode.

inputs.name: Accumulate
inputs.description: Gate input. Holds Activation messages until gate received; channels display Orange.

inputs.name: Span CV
inputs.description: CV input for Span parameter. Also accepts Channel Index output from other N.U.S.S. modules.

inputs.name: Curve CV
inputs.description: Traditional live CV input for Curve — global, not subject to Spread or Modulation Dissemination.

inputs.name: Rise CV
inputs.description: CV input for Rise time. Switches to Modulation Dissemination when patched.

inputs.name: Fall CV
inputs.description: CV input for Fall time. Switches to Modulation Dissemination when patched.

inputs.name: Shape CV
inputs.description: Traditional live CV input for Shape — global, not subject to Spread or Modulation Dissemination.

inputs.name: Strength CV
inputs.description: CV input for Strength. Switches to Modulation Dissemination when patched.

inputs.name: Rate CV
inputs.description: CV input for Rate. Switches to Modulation Dissemination when patched.

inputs.name: Osc CV
inputs.description: CV input for Osc depth. Switches to Modulation Dissemination when patched.

inputs.name: Cycle Input
inputs.description: Gate input. Engages Cycling while gate is high (ignored if Cycle button is on).

inputs.name: Reset Input
inputs.description: Gate input. Resets PoliMATHS per current Span Mode.

outputs.name: Channel Outputs 1–8
outputs.description: Individual function/oscillation outputs per channel. When SubMixing ON, patch into outputs to create submixes.

outputs.name: Channel Index Output
outputs.description: CV indicating currently Activated channel (0.5V/channel, e.g. Ch1=0.5V, Ch2=1V). Patch to N.U.S.S. Span inputs.

behaviors.name: Channel Index Mode
behaviors.description: Span selects channel to Activate. Patching Activate input requires gate to fire; unpatched means channel Activates on selection. Used for N.U.S.S. module-to-module communication.

behaviors.name: Round Mode
behaviors.description: Each trigger advances by Span channels. Span=1 is sequential round-robin through all 8. Reset returns to Channel 1. Lefthand Span values cause leftward motion.

behaviors.name: Parallel Mode
behaviors.description: Each channel Activates at a clock division of the Activate input. Divisions set by Span. Reset resets all clock division counters.

behaviors.name: Cycle ALL
behaviors.description: Each channel re-Activates when its own Fall stage completes. Equivalent to patching MATHS EOR → Trig per channel.

behaviors.name: Follow the Leader Cycle
behaviors.description: When a channel's Fall finishes, the channel immediately to its right is Activated, creating a chain through to Channel 8 which loops back to Channel 1.

behaviors.name: SubMixing
behaviors.description: When SubMixing is ON, patching into a channel output removes it from all outputs further down the line, creating submix groups.

patchIdeas.name: 8-voice polyphony with MultiWAVE and QXG
patchIdeas.patch: Ch.Index Out → MultiWAVE Span CV · PoliMATHS outputs → QXG control headers · MultiWAVE → QXG signal headers
patchIdeas.diagram:
POLIMATHS:
* Mode: Channel Index
* Cycle: Off
- Keys (Gate) g> PoliMATHS (Activate) // fire envelope for selected voice
- PoliMATHS (Channel Index Output) >> MultiWAVE (Span CV) // route voice
- PoliMATHS (Channel Outputs 1–8) >> QXG (Control Inputs 1–4) // via header
- MultiWAVE (Channel 1–8 Outputs) -> QXG (Signal Inputs 1–4) // via header

patchIdeas.name: Complex polyrhythm
patchIdeas.patch: Parallel mode · Span set to spread clock divisions · different Rise/Fall per channel via Spread
patchIdeas.diagram:
POLIMATHS:
* Mode: Parallel
* Cycle: Off
- Clock (Out) c> PoliMATHS (Activate) // divided per channel by Span
- PoliMATHS (Channel Outputs 1–8) >> QXG (Control Inputs 1–4) // polyrhythmic VCAs

patchIdeas.name: Audio-rate oscillator bank
patchIdeas.patch: Bipolar Oscillation mode · Osc full CW · Rate → 1v/oct pitch · Strength sets amplitude
patchIdeas.diagram:
POLIMATHS:
* Osc: Full CW
* Oscillation Bias: Bipolar
* Rate Attenuverter: Full CW
- Keys (Pitch) p> PoliMATHS (Rate CV) // 1V/oct tracking
- PoliMATHS (Channel Outputs 1–8) -> Mixer (In) // 8-osc bank
